name: default
description: Sensible defaults for any AI agent project. Checks the most critical governance requirements.

rules.name: At Least One Agent Defined
rules.description: The manifest must define at least one agent.

rules.name: All Agents Must Have Tiers
rules.description: Every agent must have a tier (T0-T4) to enable authority ceiling enforcement.

rules.name: All Agents Must Have Authority Limits
rules.description: Every agent must declare an authority_limit to prevent uncontrolled spending or actions.

rules.name: No Wildcard Tool Access
rules.description: Agents must not use wildcard (*) in allowed_actions — this grants unrestricted capabilities.

rules.name: No Hardcoded Secrets
rules.description: API keys, tokens, and credentials must not be hardcoded in source files.
